items.title: The Hidden World of Insect Wings Revealed by Macro Photographer
items.summary: A photographer uses lighting and special equipment to capture something not usually seen by the human eye: the intricate patterns, texture, and color found on insect wings. [Read More]

items.title: These Earbuds Have Tiny Cameras That Take Photos and Let Users Talk to AI About What They See
items.summary: Scientists have built tiny cameras into off-the-shelf wireless earbuds that capture low-resolution images to allow users to talk with an AI system about what is in front of them. [Read More]

items.title: Fujifilm Has Over 40 New Lens Ideas: ‘It’s Difficult to Convey How Much We Care About Our Lenses’
items.summary: This week on the PetaPixel Podcast, we sat down with Yuji Igarashi, General Manager of Professional Imaging Products in Fujifilm's Imaging Solutions Division. Echoing Fujifilm's successful Focus on Gl…

items.title: Why So Many Watch Enthusiasts Love One Specific Camera
items.summary: Among the watch enthusiast community, one camera seemingly proves inordinately popular. Horophiles, or those who love timekeeping devices, gravitate toward the Ricoh GR IIIx. Why? [Read More]
